title: agropyron intermedium var. campestre
intro: Agropyron intermedium var. campestre, also known as crested wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Agropyron intermedium var. campestre include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
